summary: Terminal det=1.0 MHz Ramsey job nv23_ramsey_20260514_230820_auto_ramsey completed and was raw-exported/analyzed: 16x50000 reps, healthy pre/post counts 40.445/42.702 kcps, no stop request, safe shutdown ok, no scan-order drift flags. The review supports short/few-us T2star order but not a robust scalar; 13C remains not established, though a weak det+13C-compatible candidate is present. A bridge-free synthesis compared det=1.5 and det=1.0 Ramsey plus weak-pi pODMR, then modeled a targeted det=1.25 MHz third-det artifact-rejection Ramsey. Intent verifier and MATLAB advisory passed with no blockers, and bridge job nv23_ramsey_20260515_030822_auto_ramsey was launched; latest checked state is running at average 1/16 with monitor active, no last_error, stop_requested=false, and Final about 43.7 kcps. Updated state, backlog, evidence ledger, notes, and lab log.

next_action.reason: Det=1.25 MHz third-det Ramsey is running; bridge-touching work is blocked until terminal success/failure or hard anomaly evidence. On terminal success, raw-export the savedexperiment, plot raw/reference-aware/self-baseline views, run scan-order-aware drift diagnostic, and compare target bins at direct 13C ~0.385 MHz, det-13C ~0.865 MHz, carrier 1.250 MHz, det+13C ~1.635 MHz, old det=1.0 high-sideband/static-artifact region near 1.4 MHz, static low region near 0.7 MHz, and previous ~1.9 MHz ambiguity.
